title: Elysium Spa Neroli & Sweet Orange Epsom Salts
features: CITRUS FRESH: Elysium Spa Neroli & Sweet Orange Epsom Salts, relax, unwind and enjoy the combined uplifting Neroli and calming Orange fragrance. Each reselable pack contains 3 fragranced bath bombs

BUBBLE FREE : Prefer the perfect scented, silky water to relax into? Elysium Spa Epsom Salts are the perfect addition to your bath, easy to use, just add water, add the bath bomb, which will gently and release it's fragrance. Relax and enjoy.

100 PercentNATURAL: Elysium Spa Citrus Fresh Epsom Salts, magnesium sulphate, a pure mineral compound with a variety of uses. Generations of people have relied on its natural values, as it absorbs through the skin's surface to gently help support the removal of toxins.

THERAPEUTIC BATH: Elysium Spa Epsom Salts, whether soaking your feet or taking a bath in espsom salts, it will soothe muscle aches, relax the body and improve circulation. The Epsom Salts even treat sunburn. Adding epsom salts to a bath will help the relaxation of the body and mind to promote a restful night's sleep
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Elysium Spa Citrus Fresh, 100 PercentNatural Epsom Salts. Ready to use, resealable bag 450g
